name: logo-platform
description: AI Logo Design Platform — Design Brain

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @logo-platform/backend" "wait-on http://localhost:3001/api/health -t 60000 && npm run dev -w @logo-platform/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @logo-platform/shared && npm run build -w @logo-platform/database && npm run build -w @logo-platform/knowledge-base && npm run build -w @logo-platform/catalog-importer && npm run build -w @logo-platform/prompt-engine && npm run build -w @logo-platform/ai-engines && npm run build -w @logo-platform/image-generator && npm run build -w @logo-platform/design-brain && npm run build -w @logo-platform/backend && npm run build -w @logo-platform/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:brain && npm run test:brain:eval && npm run test:backend:e2e
